title: Sales Manager Vacancy at HUDCO - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at HUDCO - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
HUDCO, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About HUDCO:
HUDCO is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HUDCO!
